summary: Completed comprehensive SEO audit and implementation testing for ManoProtect. All 20 test cases passed: sitemap.xml with 42 URLs, robots.txt properly formatted, sw.js v5, 9 blog articles (6 new + 3 original), 4 SEO problem-solution pages, 4 SEO keyword pages, opiniones-clientes with 12 testimonials, home page with updated meta and 8 FAQ questions.

issues: New blog articles show green gradient placeholder instead of images (as expected per agent_to_agent_context)

context_for_next_testing_agent: SEO implementation complete. 6 new blog articles (phishing, SMS scams, WhatsApp scams, bank account theft, family protection, phishing prevention), 4 problem-solution pages (me-han-hackeado-la-cuenta, me-han-estafado-online, que-hacer-si-recibes-phishing, como-recuperar-cuenta-robada), 4 SEO keyword pages (proteccion-familiar, alerta-sos-familiar, proteccion-estafas-online, seguridad-digital-familias), opiniones-clientes page with 12 testimonials. Sitemap has 42 URLs. All pages use SEOArticleLayout component with Article schema, breadcrumbs, and CTA sections.
